stemHtml: Over non-mountainous terrain where no minimum flight altitude is established, IFR flights must be at least…

options.a: 1000 ft above the highest obstacle within 8 km of the estimated position.
options.b: 2000 ft above the highest obstacle within 8 km of the estimated position.
options.c: 2000 ft above the highest obstacle within 6 km of the estimated position.
options.d: 1000 ft above the highest obstacle within 6 km of the estimated position.
